This strategy uses Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify high volatility periods in the market coupled with a powerful trend indicator (EMA Crossover) which is combined with effective moving averages like Bollinger Band, Stochastic, and RSI. The resulting signals are buy/sell opportunities that take into account both price action and historical volatility.
